semantics: Marks a venue as a Dojo partner. Presence = partner (booking or request available). Absence = not a partner (no booking available).

anatomy.description: Pill-shaped container (border-radius: 9999px). Height: 24px. Fixed cyan background.
Fixed label text: 'Dojo Partner'. Note: Figma layer name has a typo ('Dojo Parnet') — correct label is 'Dojo Partner'. Manrope SemiBold, 12px, whitespace-nowrap.

sizeNote: Single size only — height 24px. No size variants.
usageContext: Presence indicates Dojo partnership — user can book or request.
Absence indicates non-partner venue — no booking available.
notes: Component updated in Customer DS: file iYqpx8x8Kxdixf8YSRkiCz, node 132:1167.
Previously two variants (bookable / request only) — now a single badge.
Icon changed from Customer-Icon/check and Customer-Icon/chat-message to Customer-Icon/dojo-logo.
Semantics changed: badge now means 'Dojo partner' not 'booking type'.
Figma layer has a typo: 'Dojo Parnet' — correct label is 'Dojo Partner'.
Uses chart-pair/cyan tokens only — pink tokens removed.
